raw_entries.text: Match ends, Brazil 2, Japan 1.
Second Half ends, Brazil 2, Japan 1.
Foul by Shuto Machino (Japan).
Marquinhos (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Shogo Taniguchi (Japan).
Endrick (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Substitution, Brazil. Danilo Santos replaces Bruno Guimarães.
Substitution, Japan. Koki Ogawa replaces Daizen Maeda.
Goal! Brazil 2, Japan 1. Gabriel Martinelli (Brazil) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Bruno Guimarães.
Attempt missed. Fabinho (Brazil) header from the centre of the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Bruno Guimarães with a cross following a corner.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Brazil. Fabinho replaces Casemiro because of an injury.
Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Shogo Taniguchi.
Delay in match because of an injury Casemiro (Brazil).
Foul by Ao Tanaka (Japan).
Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.
Attempt blocked. Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Gabriel Martinelli.
Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Kaishu Sano.
Foul by Junnosuke Suzuki (Japan).
Rayan (Brazil) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Junnosuke Suzuki.
Danilo (Brazil) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Junnosuke Suzuki (Japan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Japan. Shuto Machino replaces Junya Ito.
Substitution, Japan. Ao Tanaka replaces Daichi Kamada.
Attempt missed. Gabriel Martinelli (Brazil) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the right.

Foul by Gabriel Martinelli (Brazil).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Substitution, Brazil. Gabriel Martinelli replaces Matheus Cunha.
Substitution, Japan. Junnosuke Suzuki replaces Keito Nakamura.
Substitution, Japan. Yukinari Sugawara replaces Ritsu Doan.
Attempt saved. Ayase Ueda (Japan) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Alisson Becker (Brazil). Assisted by Daizen Maeda.
Handball by Ayase Ueda (Japan).
Attempt saved. Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Zion Suzuki (Japan). Assisted by Rayan.
Attempt missed. Matheus Cunha (Brazil) right footed shot from outside the box is too high following a fast break.
Goal! Brazil 1, Japan 1. Casemiro (Brazil) header from the right side of the six yard box to the top right corner. Assisted by Gabriel Magalhães with a cross.
Attempt blocked. Casemiro (Brazil) header from very close range is blocked. Assisted by Douglas Santos with a headed pass.
Attempt missed. Endrick (Brazil) left footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Vinícius Júnior with a cross.
Attempt saved. Bruno Guimarães (Brazil) header from the centre of the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Zion Suzuki (Japan). Assisted by Danilo with a cross.
Takehiro Tomiyasu (Japan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Matheus Cunha (Brazil).
Daizen Maeda (Japan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Danilo (Brazil).
Danilo (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Handball by Ritsu Doan (Japan).
Second Half begins Brazil 0, Japan 1.
Substitution, Brazil. Endrick replaces Lucas Paquetá because of an injury.
First Half ends, Brazil 0, Japan 1.
Attempt blocked. Lucas Paquetá (Brazil) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Marquinhos.
